question: what ner models were evaluated?
text: In the pioNER experiments, the evaluated NER models were Stanford NER, spaCy 2.0, and a recurrent model using bidirectional LSTM cells for character-based feature extraction and CRF. [1]

citations.title: pioNER: Datasets and Baselines for Armenian Named Entity Recognition
citations.text: In this section we describe a number of experiments targeted to compare the performance of popular named entity recognition algorithms on our data. We trained and evaluated Stanford NER, spaCy 2.0, and a recurrent model similar to BIBREF13 , BIBREF14 that uses bidirectional LSTM cells for character-based feature extraction and CRF, described in Guillaume Genthial's Sequence Tagging with Tensorflow blog post BIBREF15 .
